meta.summary: Qualimap 2.3 for sequencing alignment quality control, including BAM QC, RNA-seq QC, Counts QC, multi-sample BAM QC, and an optional browser-accessible GUI session.
meta.description: Qualimap 2.3 for sequencing alignment quality control, including BAM QC, RNA-seq QC, Counts QC, multi-sample BAM QC, and an optional browser-accessible GUI session.

test: qualimap --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'QualiMap v.2.3' >/dev/null && qualimap --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Available tools:' >/dev/null

{ qualimap bamqc --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage: qualimap bamqc' >/dev/null && { qualimap rnaseq --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage: qualimap rnaseq' >/dev/null && { qualimap multi-bamqc --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage: qualimap multi-bamqc' >/dev/null && { qualimap counts --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage: qualimap counts' >/dev/null && { qualimap clustering --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage: qualimap clustering' >/dev/null && { qualimap comp-counts --help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage: qualimap comp-counts' >/dev/null
Rscript -e 'library(optparse); library(NOISeq); library(XML); library(Rsamtools); library(GenomicFeatures); library(rtracklayer); library(MASS); library(gsmoothr); library(Repitools)'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-qualimap-bamqc && cd /tmp/taf-qualimap-bamqc && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:coordinate
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
r001	0	chr1	1	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAA	FFFFFFFFFF
' > tiny.sam && qualimap bamqc -bam tiny.sam -outdir out --java-mem-size=512M >/tmp/taf-qualimap-bamqc.log 2>&1 && test -s out/qualimapReport.html && grep -F 'number of reads = 1' out/genome_results.txt >/dev/null && cp -a out out2 && printf 'sample1	out
sample2	out2
' > multi-bamqc.tsv && qualimap multi-bamqc -d multi-bamqc.tsv -outdir multi --java-mem-size=512M >/tmp/taf-qualimap-multi-bamqc.log 2>&1 && find multi -type f -name '*.html' -print -quit | grep -q .

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-qualimap-counts && cd /tmp/taf-qualimap-counts && printf 'gene1	10
gene2	20
gene3	5
gene4	1
' > counts1.tsv && printf 'gene1	12
gene2	25
gene3	4
gene4	2
' > counts2.tsv && printf 'sample1	control	counts1.tsv	2
sample2	treated	counts2.tsv	2
' > design.tsv && qualimap counts -d design.tsv -outdir out --java-mem-size=512M >/tmp/taf-qualimap-counts.log 2>&1 && find out -type f -name '*.html' -print -quit | grep -q .

qualimap-gui --help >/dev/null && (qualimap-gui --geometry 800x600 >/tmp/taf-qualimap-gui.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; ok=0; i=0; while [ $i -lt 45 ]; do if curl -fs http://127.0.0.1:5801/vnc.html >/dev/null 2>&1; then ok=1; break; fi; i=$((i + 1)); sleep 1; done; kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; test $ok -eq 1 && grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:5801/vnc.html?autoconnect=1&resize=scale' /tmp/taf-qualimap-gui.log >/dev/null && grep -F 'Qualimap GUI is starting.' /tmp/taf-qualimap-gui.log >/dev/null)

upstream.name: Qualimap
upstream.citation: Okonechnikov et al. 2016; García-Alcalde et al. 2012
